creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
Created attachment 243340
portstree patch for update to 1.12.2

Changes since last ports version 1.12.0:

- FritzCall: New method `hangup()`. (#184)

- FritzHosts: bugfix: removed issues preventing the method `get_hosts_attributes()` to return a list of dictionaries representing the host-attributes. (#190)

- bugfix in 'setup.py`: add `long_description_content_type="text/markdown"`, because it is not used as default.
